attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.RESERVATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.REQUIREMENT_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.DEMAND_SOURCE_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.RESERVATION_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.PRIMARY_RESERVATION_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SUPPLY_SOURCE_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.DEMAND_SOURCE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.DEMAND_SOURCE_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.DEMAND_SOURCE_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.DEMAND_SOURCE_DELIVERY, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.PRIMARY_UOM_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.PRIMARY_UOM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.RESERVATION_UOM_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.RESERVATION_UOM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.AUTODETAIL_GROUP_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.EXTERNAL_SOURCE_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.EXTERNAL_SOURCE_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SUPPLY_SOURCE_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SUPPLY_SOURCE_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SUPPLY_SOURCE_LINE_DETAIL, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SUPPLY_SOURCE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.REVISION, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SUBINVENTORY_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SUBINVENTORY_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.LOCATOR_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.LOT_INTEGER, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.LOT_INTEGER_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SERIAL_INTEGER, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SERIAL_INTEGER_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.PARTIAL_QUANTITIES_ALLOWED, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.AUTO_DETAILED, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.PICK_SLIP_INTEGER, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.LPN_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SHIP_READY_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.N_COLUMN1, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.DETAILED_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.COST_GROUP_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.CONTAINER_LPN_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.STAGED_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SECONDARY_DETAILED_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SECONDARY_RESERVATION_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SECONDARY_UOM_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SECONDARY_UOM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.CROSSDOCK_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.CROSSDOCK_CRITERIA_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.DEMAND_SOURCE_LINE_DETAIL, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SERIAL_RESERVATION_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SUPPLY_RECEIPT_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.DEMAND_SHIP_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.EXCEPTION_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ORIG_SUPPLY_SOURCE_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ORIG_SUPPLY_SOURCE_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ORIG_SUPPLY_SOURCE_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ORIG_SUPPLY_SOURCE_LINE_DETAIL, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ORIG_DEMAND_SOURCE_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ORIG_DEMAND_SOURCE_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ORIG_DEMAND_SOURCE_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.ORIG_DEMAND_SOURCE_LINE_DETAIL, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.PROJECT_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.TASK_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS,
 (
 select RESERVATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS
 minus
 select RESERVATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.RESERVATION_ID = STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.RESERVATION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_RESERVATIONS)
